title: Ml Engineer
jobDescription:
We are seeking a talented and passionate Machine Learning Engineer to join our growing team. You will play a key role in designing, developing, and deploying machine learning (ML) solutions that drive business value. This role requires expertise in Python programming, container orchestration with Kubernetes, and cloud deployment.


Responsibilities:

  • Design, develop, and deploy production-ready ML models using Python libraries (e.g., Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch) and big data frameworks (e.g., Spark).
  • Manage the deployment of ML models to the cloud environment and optimize the performance of ML Models.
  • Collaborate with data scientists, software engineers, and product managers to ensure successful implementation of ML solutions.
  • Leverage Docker and Kubernetes to containerize ML models for scalability and portability.
  • Stay up-to-date on the latest advancements in MLOPS, data science and machine learning.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's/Master's degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
  • Proven experience with Python programming & PySpark for data science and machine learning.
  • Experience with DevOps Concepts CI/CD and Shell Scripting
  • Experience with container orchestration platforms like Kubernetes and containerization technologies like Docker.
  • Experience with cloud deployment (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure).
  • Good understanding of machine learning algorithms and concepts.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Bonus points:

  • Working knowledge of ML algorithms
  • Experience developing self-service applications.
  • Experience with model monitoring and observability tools.

title: GEN AI Engineer
jobDescription:
Responsibilities:

  • Design and develop AI and Generative AI based custom solutions for our service delivery teams
  • Work with other team members to implement and deploy generative AI systems into production.
  • Monitor and manage generative AI systems in production to ensure that they are meeting performance and reliability requirements.
  • Develop and implement best practices for building, deploying, and managing generative AI systems.
  • Stay up-to-date on the latest research and developments in generative AI and apply new knowledge to our work.
  • Collaborate with other engineers, scientists, and product managers to develop and deliver innovative generative AI solutions.
  • Mentor and guide junior engineers

Qualifications:

  • Bachelors or master's degree in computer science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field.
  • 1+ years of experience in generative AI.
  • 6+ years of experience in AI based software development

Preferred Skills and Experience:

  • Strong experience in designing, building, and deploying scalable machine learning models in cloud platforms such as Azure or GCP
  • Experience with a variety of generative AI models and techniques.
  • Experience with deep learning models such as GANs, diffusion models, and transformers.
  • Experience with prompt engineering and machine learning optimization
  • Experience with computer vision and natural language processing.
  • Experience with reinforcement learning.
  • Experience with distributed computing and scalable systems.
  • Experience with DevOps and CI/CD.
  • Experience with machine learning ethics
  • Experience with generative AI applications in specific domains such as talent management, finance, risk management

title: Hiring For AI Engineer - Kolkata -Bangalore -Ahmedabad

ambitionBoxData.Title: BDO RISE Private Limited Reviews by Employees

jobDescription:
Job Duties

Key Responsibilities:

  • Design, develop, and deploy state-of-the-art AI and machine learning models that address complex problems.
  • Stay updated on the latest advancements in AI frameworks, algorithms, and tools to apply innovative solutions to business needs
  • Research and prototype new algorithms and techniques for specific use cases.
  • Build scalable, reliable, and efficient AI pipelines and data architectures.
  • Optimize model performance (e.g., accuracy, latency, training times) to meet production requirements.
  • Implement A/B testing, monitoring, debugging, and retraining frameworks for AI models in production.
  • Work closely with stakeholders to understand requirements and translate business objectives into AI-driven solutions.
  • Communicate technical concepts and results effectively to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines for automated model updating and retraining.
  • Responsible for design and technical oversight of a team of developers

Qualifications, Knowledge, Skills and Abilities

Education:

  • A degree (Bachelor's, Master's, or Ph.D.) in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, or a related technical field.
  • 5-7 years of demonstrable experience building cutting-edge AI/ML solutions. Proven experience in both research and production environments.

Experience:

  • Experience with Generative AI techniques (e.g., transformers, diffusion models).
  • Hands-on knowledge of building AI systems for specific industries (e.g., healthcare, fintech, retail).
  • Familiarity with DevOps principles as applied to AI delivery.
  • Expertise in supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning. Proficiency with statistical techniques, neural networks, NLP, and/or computer vision models.
  • Advanced programming skills in Python / C#, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, and/or Scikit-learn. Experience with frameworks such as Hugging Face is a plus.
  • Strong understanding of data preprocessing, feature engineering, and working with large-scale datasets. Knowledge of Spark, Hadoop, or similar systems is a plus.
  • Proven hands-on experience in analyzing data (using Pandas, Numpy, etc.) and visualizing it with tools such as Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, or Tableau.
  • Familiarity with MLOps practices, tools like MLflow, Kubeflow, or SageMaker, and CI/CD for AI workflows.
  • Experience with cloud ecosystems like Azure or AWS AI infrastructure.
  • Proficiency in SQL and NoSQL databases. Understanding of data storage solutions like AWS S3, PostgreSQL, etc.
  • Strong experience with Git/GitHub

Other Knowledge, Skills & Abilities

  • Strong communication and relationship building skills. Possess personal qualities of integrity, credibility, and commitment to corporate mission.
  • Flexible and able to multitask; can work within an ambiguous, fast-moving environment, while also driving toward clarity and solutions
  • Demonstrated resourcefulness in setting priorities and guiding investment in people and systems.
  • Capacity to work in a deadline-driven environment while handling multiple projects/tasks simultaneously with a focus on details.
  • Capable of successfully multi-tasking while working independently or within a group environment
  • Capable of working well under pressure while dealing with unexpected problems in a professional manner
  • Ability to work well in a cross-functional team environment.
  • Excellent interpersonal and customer relationship skills
  • Must have excellent organizational and multi-tasking skills.

Keywords: I /ML /NLP /Generative AI, Python, C#, Azure, OpenAI, Git, Github


Immediate Joiner Preferred .
